faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently Asked Questions about NvwaX
faq.pageTitle: FAQ - AI Agent & Virtual Company Platform
faq.pageDesc: Frequently asked questions about the NvwaX AI Agent and Virtual Company platform. Learn how to search, manage projects, create AiTeams, contribute code, and more.
faq.ogTitle: NvwaX FAQ - AI Agent & Virtual Company Platform
faq.ogDesc: 20+ FAQ covering getting started, search, data management, technical issues, and more.
faq.searchPlaceholder: Search questions... (e.g., how to search, data storage, API)
faq.searchHelp: Quickly find the answers you need, or submit an Issue if not found
faq.ctaDesc: Our team is happy to help, or browse the API docs for technical details
faq.a1: NvwaX is an open-source AI Agent search, discovery and management platform. It helps you discover and explore excellent AI Agent projects from multiple data sources including GitHub, Gitee, HuggingFace, and supports local database caching and global search capabilities.
faq.q2: How do I get started with NvwaX?
faq.a2:
1. Visit the homepage http://localhost:3000
2. Enter keywords in the search box (e.g. "ai agent")
3. Browse search results or use quick filters
4. Click on an Agent of interest to view details
5. Register to create projects and manage Agent teams
faq.a3: Basic search and browsing features are available without registration. However, you need to register to create projects, manage Agent teams, or use advanced features.
faq.q4: How do I search for Agents?
faq.a4:
You can enter keywords to search on the homepage or search page. Supported features include:
- Keyword search (Agent name, description, tags)
- Quick filters (All, GitHub, Gitee, Chinese Companies)
- Paginated browsing
- Sort by stars
faq.q5: Where does search data come from?
faq.a5:
NvwaX uses a hybrid search strategy:
1. First searches the local database (240+ crawled Agents)
2. If no local results, performs a global search (GitHub API, HuggingFace API)
3. Results are automatically saved to the local database for future use
faq.a6: When searching a keyword for the first time, if the local database has no results, the system performs a global search which may take a few seconds. Subsequent searches for the same keyword return results directly from the local database.
faq.q7: How often is Agent data updated?
faq.a7: The system automatically runs a crawler task every 24 hours to fetch the latest Agent data from various platforms. Administrators can also trigger crawling manually.
faq.a8: All Agent metadata is stored in Neon PostgreSQL cloud database, ensuring data persistence and high availability. Your personal account information is also securely stored in the cloud.
faq.a9:
Currently supported data sources include:
- GitHub (primary source, 200+ Agents)
- Gitee (Chinese code hosting platform, 15+ Agents)
- HuggingFace (AI model platform)
- Chinese tech companies (Baidu, Alibaba, Tencent, Huawei, etc.)
faq.q10: How do I create a project?
faq.a10:
1. Log into your account
2. Visit "My Projects" page
3. Click "Create New Project"
4. Fill in the project name and description
5. Save and start adding Agent teams
faq.a11: AiTeam is a core concept of NvwaX, representing an AI Agent collaboration team. You can create multiple AiTeams in a project, each containing multiple cooperating Agents for specific tasks.
faq.q12: What port does the backend use?
faq.a12: The backend API service runs at {apiUrl}, and the frontend app runs at http://localhost:3000. Make sure both services are running.
faq.q13: How do I view the API docs?
faq.a13: Visit http://localhost:3000/api/docs to view the complete API documentation, including all endpoints, parameter descriptions, and usage examples.
faq.a14:
This usually means the backend service is not running. Please check:
1. Is the backend service started (port 3001)
2. Run: cd packages/nvwax-server && npm run dev
3. Confirm PostgreSQL database connection is working
faq.q15: How to fix browser icon errors?
faq.a15: This is a browser cache issue. Press Ctrl+Shift+R (Windows) or Cmd+Shift+R (Mac) to hard refresh the page.
faq.a16:
We welcome all forms of contribution! Check the CONTRIBUTING.md file for detailed contribution guidelines. You can:
- Submit Issues to report problems
- Submit Pull Requests to fix bugs
- Improve documentation
- Propose new features
faq.q17: What open source license does this project use?
faq.a17: NvwaX uses the MIT open source license. You are free to use, modify and distribute the code, as long as you retain the original copyright notice and license.
faq.q18: How do I report a bug?
faq.a18:
Create a new Issue on the GitHub Issues page, including:
- Problem description
- Reproduction steps
- Expected behavior
- Actual behavior
- Environment info (OS, browser version, etc.)
- Screenshots or logs (if available)
faq.a19: Currently NvwaX is a responsive web app that works on mobile and tablet. Native mobile apps may be developed in the future.
faq.q20: How do I contact the development team?
faq.a20:
You can reach us through:
- GitHub Issues: https://github.com/BigLionX/NvwaX/issues
- GitHub Discussions: https://github.com/BigLionX/NvwaX/discussions
- Email: 1055603323@qq.com
faq.a21:
Check the Roadmap section in README.md for details. Major directions include:
- v1.0: Core search and management features (completed)
- v1.1: SkillHub integration and workflow engine
- v2.0: AI-assisted Agent building and team collaboration

developer.faq1Q: How do I get an API Key?
developer.faq1A: Register an account, then generate an API Key in the Console.
developer.faq2A: Officially supported: JavaScript/TypeScript. Python, Go, Java clients are in development.
developer.faq3Q: How do I upgrade my plan?
developer.faq3A: Select a new plan in the Console and complete payment.
developer.faq4A: Yes, Enterprise plan supports private deployment. Contact the sales team for details.
